expectations.text: Each solution has correct solution_type for its product's revenue_model (should be 'project' since cloud-services has no explicit revenue_model)
expectations.evidence: cloud-migration has solution_type 'project' (correct), sovereign-cloud has 'project' (correct), but sap-on-cloud has 'managed_service' instead of 'project'. The assertion expects 'project' for all three since cloud-services has no explicit revenue_model.

expectations.text: Review assessments produced for all 3 solutions
expectations.evidence: Found 3 review files: cloud-migration--grosse-energieversorger-de-review.json (3 perspectives, aggregate 118/150), sovereign-cloud--grosse-energieversorger-de-review.json (3 perspectives, aggregate 123/150), sap-on-cloud--grosse-energieversorger-de-review.json (3 perspectives, aggregate 106/150 pre-revision)

expectations.text: Batch summary categorizes solutions by acceptance round
expectations.evidence: batch-summary.json contains summary_statistics with solutions_approved_clean=2 (Round 1: cloud-migration, sovereign-cloud) and solutions_approved_with_revisions=1 (sap-on-cloud). Each solution entry has verdict and revisions_applied fields.

expectations.text: At least one solution triggered a revision round
expectations.evidence: sap-on-cloud triggered 1 revision round. All 3 review perspectives (procurement, provider SA, client SA) flagged revision_required=true. Review score improved from 70.7% to 80.7% after revision.

expectations.text: Revised solutions have higher scores than Round 1
expectations.evidence: sap-on-cloud pre-revision aggregate: 106/150 (70.7%), post-revision aggregate: 121/150 (80.7%). Increase of 15 points / 10 percentage points.

expectations.text: No more than 2 revision rounds per solution
expectations.evidence: Maximum revisions on any solution is 1 (sap-on-cloud). cloud-migration and sovereign-cloud had 0 revisions each.
